task: I need to reply to a teacher about whether I can redo part of an assignment, and I want the message to get straight to the point. Can you help me draft something that says it clearly without adding extra fluff?

turns.agent_response:
Sure — here’s a short, direct version:

**Hi [Teacher’s Name], I wanted to ask if I’m able to redo part of the assignment. Please let me know if that’s possible.**

If you want, I can make it even shorter or a little more casual/formal.

user_simulator.text:
Yeah, but make it a little firmer. That one’s kinda too polite/soft.

Something like:

Hi [Teacher’s Name], can I redo part of the assignment? Let me know if that’s allowed.

Or even shorter if you want it blunt.

turns.agent_response:
Sure — here’s a firmer, straight-to-the-point version:

**Hi [Teacher’s Name], can I redo part of the assignment? Please let me know if that’s allowed.**

If you want it even more blunt, I can make it shorter.
